ocr_findings.description: A large 4-panel diagram ('ソリューションの形態の違い') showing オンプレミス / ハウジングサービス / ホスティングサービス / クラウドコンピューティング with server icons and 自社の敷地/他社の敷地 labels is present in the image but entirely absent from OCR. Only a placeholder image reference and the caption line are present. This diagram is the primary visual content of the page and its loss materially reduces comprehension.

reviewer_notes: Content page explaining cloud computing vs hosting services. The explanatory body text is captured well, but the 4-panel comparison diagram occupying roughly 40% of the page area is entirely missing from OCR output — only an img placeholder tag remains. This is a high-severity missing_text finding that materially impacts usability of this page's OCR output.
